title: Maw's Essential
description:
Content Creation Modpack!

From FPS mods to PVP mod it got all you
body:
# Perfect Mods

Carefully Selected Mods to ensure a lag free experience with all of the necessary mods for Content Creation and PVP!

- Flashback
- Replay

# Perfect For your own playstyle!

I have selected Mods that helps you with multiples aspect in Minecraft such as building, PVP or even Redston this mod got it all!

- Armor HUD
- Screenshot Manager

# Chosen by Multiple Creators

Some known creators are already using this modpack as it is truly efficient for their videos and Minecraft session.

# Make game more realistic!

I have also added some shaders to make the game more realistic if you wish for that!
